items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 39
items.note: For 'Separating the "Ill" from "Illusions"' — defeat Janine in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 39 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Low cap (below anything since Clair) rules out higher-level Beasts; train caught Skarmory, Swinub, or Houndour instead.
